tasks.title: Entity Registry / Data Hub
tasks.description: Build canonical entity registry with one hazeydata_id per physical attraction. Cross-reference TouringPlans dimEntity, queue-times IDs, and other sources. Fix 182+ unmapped queue-times entities polluting fact tables.

tasks.title: Fix Firecrawl async API bug
tasks.description: firecrawl_batch_scraper.py expects synchronous data but Extract API v1 is async. Needs polling loop: POST /v1/extract → get job ID → GET /v1/extract/{id} until completed.
tasks.notes: Discovered by Wilma overnight while running entity-registry tasks. 0/8 districts succeeded. Source: #entity-registry. [Dino 2026-03-12] Moved to backlog — blocked on Firecrawl API changes, not on critical path. School schedules feature (task-038) completed without it. Revisit if Firecrawl scraping needed again.

tasks.title: Monitor v4 first production run
tasks.description: v4 pipeline merged to main (PR #9). First production run at 6 AM March 10. Monitor all 12 steps, verify AK improvement, confirm WTI numbers match shadow predictions.
tasks.notes: COMPLETED: v4 pipeline deployment successful. Fixed run_training_robust.sh to call pipeline_v3/pipeline.py. Fixed completeness validator date bug (checked 2027-03-09 instead of 2026-03-11). Verified 419 entities, 23.3M predictions, 79.5% model coverage. v4 working in production.

tasks.title: AK model underprediction during Spring Break
tasks.description: AK predicting 8.5-9.9 WTI (Ghost Town) during Spring Break week when actuals are 19-28. Root cause: pre-2015 half-day park data dragging predictions down. v4 should help but needs verification.
tasks.notes: Barney confirmed: pre-2015 AK mean WTI 12.1 vs post-2015 20.7. v4 shadow #3 moved AK from 8.7→13.3 (better but still under). Auto-tweets paused for AK until verified. Source: #twitter-x, #barney.

tasks.title: Pipeline Twins / Blue-Green Deploy for bot

tasks.title: QT API park mapping fix (DL = Gardaland, not Disneyland)

VERIFIED by Wilma: QUEUE_TIMES_PARK_MAP already uses park 16 (Disneyland Anaheim), not park 12 (Gardaland). Entity mapping CSV confirms correct ride IDs. Task was already resolved.
